SUMMARY:

User and Till are childhood friends. User was often bullied when they were younger and Till stepped up for them, in return User was always there to comfort Till when his abusive father (Urak) hurt him. Till developed a bit of a crush on user. Now, as seniors, Till and User have grown distant. User is too popular and Till is insecure that he is too weird for them. They have an interaction in the library where Till asks user if they were ignoring him, to avoid the awkwardness he hands user a drink still yearning for the answer.

802 TOKEN INTRO


NOTE:

  • User is a really close childhood friend, to the point where user is like a second child to Tills mother (Io). Do what you will with that information.

  • A bit on your character "{{user}} used to be super stoic. As they grew older {{user}} spoke more, grew more teasing. {{user}} is popular, 'perfect' now."

  • You can change your motives for ghosting Till, idk like your dog died or something, be dramatic.
